task: Apply a reassignment to all current filter matches when permissions and item versions change during review.
assertions: The UI distinguishes visible rows, selected page, and all filter matches.
Review names the action, scope, target count, exclusion count, and target-freezing behavior.
Permission and version changes pause or revalidate execution instead of silently overwriting records.
Results separate succeeded, skipped, failed, and processing items with per-item reasons.
forbidden_outcomes: A page-level checkbox silently selects every result without explicit confirmation.
Partial failure is represented only as a successful toast.
